target.description: Defines the target for cross-tenant access policy settings and can have one of the following values:  The unique identifier of the user, group, or application  AllUsers  AllApplications - Refers to any Microsoft cloud application.  Office365 - Includes the applications mentioned as part of the Office 365 suite.

targetType.description: The type of resource that you want to target. The possible values are: user, group, application, unknownFutureValue.
